metadata.description: Autonomous cloud security posture-sweep agents for Tenable Cloud Security — MCP edition and API-token (GraphQL) edition. Address critical findings (root MFA, third-party sensitive access, public exposure, exposed secrets) and low-hanging fruits (inactive identities, unused credentials, unused security groups).

plugins.name: cloud-risk-triage-agent
plugins.description: MCP edition. Seven posture checks in two sections — Address critical findings (root MFA, third-party sensitive-data access, public exposure, exposed secrets) and Address low-hanging fruits (inactive identities, unused credentials, unused security groups) — written to a SOC-ready report. Requires the Tenable Cloud Security (tcs) MCP connector.

plugins.name: cloud-risk-triage-agent-api
plugins.description: API-token edition (no MCP). Uses the Tenable Cloud Security public GraphQL API with a Bearer token to run the same seven posture checks (critical findings + low-hanging fruits), mapped to Findings, and write a SOC-ready report.
